docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $637.88 FILED BY GIAMPOLINI & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS DOUGLAS S. DBA D.S. ADAMS CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS DOUGLAS S. DBA D.S. ADAMS CONSTRUCTION CO.
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DOUGLAS ADAMS, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIAMPOLINI & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS DOUGLAS S. DBA D.S. ADAMS CONSTRUCTION CO. $637.88 PRINCIPAL, $176.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $814.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
